reasons: Estes sustains Fredrinn through long fights while Fredrinn absorbs damage and builds Combo Points.
Fredrinn is a strong healing target because he stays in front and converts damage taken into fight pressure.

proof.summary: Estes sustains Fredrinn through long fights, helping Fredrinn stay alive long enough to use taunt pressure and Appraiser's Wrath.
worksBestWhen: Fredrinn fights near Estes and the main team.
Estes saves his ultimate for Fredrinn's committed frontline window.
Fredrinn can continue hitting enemies to build Combo Points.
failureCases: Fredrinn dives too far from Estes.
Enemy anti-heal cuts the sustain value.
Fredrinn is kited and cannot convert Crystal Energy into pressure.

reasons: Floryn helps Fredrinn survive frontline damage even when he is fighting away from the main support position.
Global healing supports Fredrinn's jungle skirmishes and objective contests.

proof.summary: Floryn's global healing lets Fredrinn stay active in extended fights and recover during objective pressure.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom until Fredrinn has taken meaningful damage.
Fredrinn is not isolated from all follow-up damage.
Fredrinn can keep enemies near him after the heal.
failureCases: Fredrinn cannot reach enemies to continue his combo chain.

reasons: Angela can attach to Fredrinn and protect him during his frontline commit.
Fredrinn gives Angela a durable host who can carry her support into the center of the fight.

proof.summary: Angela shields Fredrinn during his engage and helps him survive long enough to convert damage taken into fight pressure.
worksBestWhen: Fredrinn has Combo Points or cooldowns ready.
Fredrinn stays within team follow-up range.
failureCases: Angela attaches after Fredrinn has already spent his main skills.
Fredrinn is isolated too far from team follow-up.
Enemy suppression or burst removes Fredrinn before Angela's value builds.

reasons: Carmilla's linked enemies make Fredrinn's taunt and area pressure more valuable in grouped fights.
Fredrinn can hold the center of the fight while Carmilla's link spreads control and damage value.

proof.summary: Carmilla links enemies, while Fredrinn taunts and pressures the linked group with frontline control and Appraiser's Wrath threat.
worksBestWhen: Carmilla links multiple enemies before Fredrinn spends his burst window.
Fredrinn has enough Combo Points for meaningful follow-up.
Fredrinn keeps enemies within the linked fight area.
failureCases: Enemies spread out and reduce the link value.
Fredrinn is kited away from the linked targets.

reasons: Mathilda helps Fredrinn reach the fight or reposition when enemies try to kite him.
Mathilda's shield gives Fredrinn a safer first-entry window before his own sustain loop starts.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Fredrinn movement and shield support, helping him enter or reset positioning in extended fights.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda helps Fredrinn reach enemies while staying aligned with team follow-up.
Fredrinn enters with teammates ready to follow.
Fredrinn can hit enemies after repositioning.
failureCases: Fredrinn enters but cannot hit enemies to build Combo Points.
Mathilda's mobility path creates a bad engage angle.
Enemy kiting still prevents Fredrinn from converting pressure.
